main.description: Import an existing PDS account as a group. Sibling to app.certified.group.register, but reuses an existing account rather than creating a new one. Stores the supplied app password so the service can act on the account's behalf, and seeds the caller as owner. Does not modify the account's DID document.

groupDid.description: DID of the existing account to import as a group.

appPassword.description: An app password for the account, so the service can act on its behalf. Stored encrypted, exactly as supplied; the owner manages its lifecycle and may revoke it.

handle.description: Handle resolved from the imported account.
